title: Device Home Screen - Battery life
scenario: Battery life display on Device Home Screen shows correct icons and colors for headsets, headsets with charge case, and earbuds, and greys out with last known percentage when headset is turned off.
steps: Pair and connect the headset, start the app, and navigate to the Device Home Screen.
Verify the battery percentage is shown.
Verify the battery icons are greyed out with the last known percentage displayed.
expected: Battery percentage is shown on the Device Home Screen when the headset is connected. When the headset is turned off, the battery icons are greyed out but still display the last known percentage.
